svg.title: Daily Backup System — SQLite Data Model
svg.text: Timestamps: ISO-8601 UTC text with trailing “Z” → lexicographic order is chronological
TEXT — payload AS OF this revision

text.tspan: • Every change appends an item_revisions row —
row is never removed (deletion is itself a
set per-connection in code (not in migrations —
WAL inside a transaction is a silent no-op).

svg.text: foreign key — target shown inline (→ table.col)
part of a composite UNIQUE(...) constraint
